MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jerry Curtis, Esq., DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL 510/622-2120, for respondent and opposing party California Dept. of Motor Vehicles
No other appearance on this matter. Counsel presented to the court a copy of a signed stipulated agreement to continue this hearing. The Court continued PETITIONER EARNEST PACHECHO's Petition For Alternative Writ Of Mandate to February 7, 2003 at 9:30 a.m. Counsel is to give notice of new hearing date. (JJM/301) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
